Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Enum Class FlexiPageType

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<FlexiPageType>
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.FlexiPageType
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<FlexiPageType>, Constable
public enum FlexiPageType extends Enum<FlexiPageType>

Java class for FlexiPageType

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.
